'''Morst Tayl'skar''' was a [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] from [[Clan Askar]] and a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] agent. He was transported to [[Dressel/Legends|Dressel]] by [[Pyrron Nox]] where he was attempting to contact [[Orrimaarko/Legends|Orrimaarko]].
